project_name.description: Project (and App) name. Lowercase, hyphens or underscores, no spaces.

agent_description.default: An A2A-protocol agent running on Databricks
agent_description.description: One-line description for the Agent Card

llm_endpoint.description: Databricks-hosted LLM serving endpoint backing the agent

auth_mode.description: Inbound auth: bearer, oauth_m2m, or none (none rejected in prod)

success_message:
✔ A2A agent '{{.project_name}}' scaffold created.

Next steps:
  1. cd {{.project_name}}
  2. cp .env.example .env.local && fill in values
  3. uv sync && make unit
  4. databricks bundle deploy -t dev
  5. databricks bundle run a2a_agent_app -t dev

Then read docs/DEVELOPMENT.md for the dev loop.
